home.hero_subtitle: Yemen Oil Company - Leadership in National Service and Sustainable Development
home.ceo_quote: We are committed to providing energy for Yemen, ensuring the stability of oil supplies across the nation.
home.ceo_text: Yemen Oil Company was established to be the cornerstone of the national energy sector. We work hard to develop our infrastructure and adopt the latest technologies to ensure that oil derivatives reach every citizen efficiently and transparently. Our vision is leadership and excellence in serving the community and contributing effectively to sustainable development.

common.request_submitted_desc: Thank you for your feedback. Your request has been received and will be processed by our team. You will receive an update via your provided contact information.

procedures_guide.need_help_desc: If you couldn't find what you're looking for in the guides above, please contact our support team.
